message:
refactor(cli): Use getHomeDir() for testable skill paths

Replace direct homedir() calls with getHomeDir() from config module
in install, installed, uninstall, and update commands. This allows
tests to redirect filesystem operations to temp directories via the
JFP_HOME environment variable, enabling real filesystem tests without
mocking fs modules.

Part of the test infrastructure epic to eliminate mock-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
